description_long: This object is a smooth, oval-shaped egg with a uniform light brown color across its entire surface. The shell appears unblemished and lacks any visible markings, cracks, or decorative patterns. Its surface is slightly glossy, suggesting a hard, calcified exterior typical of a chicken egg. The egg is symmetrical along its horizontal axis, with a gentle curvature and no pronounced pointed or rounded end visible from these views. The coloration is consistent, with a subtle gradient indicating natural shading. The overall appearance is clean and natural, resembling a standard farm-fresh egg.
description: A smooth, light brown, oval egg with a hard, slightly glossy shell and no visible markings.
description_view_0: A uniformly brown, smooth oval egg with a subtle highlight at the center.
description_view_1: The egg appears identical to view 0, showing a consistent brown color and smooth surface.
description_view_2: This view maintains the same smooth, unmarked brown surface as the other angles.
description_view_3: The egg remains uniformly colored and smooth, with no visible features distinguishing this side.
attribute_orientation: lying flat with the long axis parallel to the surface
attribute_contextual_placement: Most likely encountered as part of a meal preparation area or in a grocery setting.
